payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event delivery detected for the same event ID. Do not create or update memory a second time.

entity_resolution.reason: This is a retry of the same Slack event ID; no additional entity resolution or memory write should occur on the duplicate delivery.

details: Detected duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID.
No new memory cards emitted on the retry.
Preserves exactly-once behavior for durable memory.

repair_options: If the original event was not actually persisted, process exactly once using the original event ID as the idempotency key.
If event-ID tracking is missing, add deduplication keyed by Slack event ID before writing durable memory.
